description: A corporate client is involved in civil litigation and is compelled to produce all text notes recovered from a former employee's seized USB drive. Bridge digital forensics and litigation support by creating an Autopsy case named 'EDiscovery_Smith_v_Corp' (Case Number: 'CIV-2024-882') in '/home/ga/Cases/' using the disk image '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. Locate and extract all allocated and deleted '.txt' files (excluding filesystem metadata) to '/home/ga/Reports/Production/raw/'. Programmatically generate a Bates-numbered production set in '/home/ga/Reports/Production/bates/' by sorting the extracted files alphabetically by their exported filenames and renaming them sequentially starting with 'PROD-0001.txt'. Produce a pipe-delimited load file at '/home/ga/Reports/Production/load_file.csv' with the header BATES_NUMBER|ORIGINAL_FILENAME|MD5_HASH|FILE_SIZE, containing the mapping, MD5 hashes, and file sizes in bytes for the production set.
